info.name: Meetzy API
info.description: Postman collection for Meetzy app вЂ” Auth Login, Profile Update, and Video Calling. Total: 6 requests.

item.name: 1. Auth вЂ” Login
item.description: Single endpoint handles all auth flows вЂ” new user, profile setup, and returning user. token_id is always required. All other fields are optional. Flutter navigates based on isProfileComplete in the response.

exec: console.log('isProfileComplete: true в†’ Flutter goes to Home Screen');
console.log('isProfileComplete: false в†’ Flutter shows Profile Setup Screen');

request.description:
One API for all 3 Flutter scenarios. token_id is always required. All other fields are optional вЂ” remove them when not needed.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
USAGE GUIDE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Scenario A вЂ” Login Screen (new or returning):
Send only token_id. Remove all other fields.
в†’ New user:      isProfileComplete: false в†’ show Profile Setup Screen
в†’ Returning user: isProfileComplete: true  в†’ go to Home Screen

Scenario B вЂ” Profile Setup Screen:
Send token_id + display_name + gender + country_name + country_code.
в†’ Backend saves profile, isProfileComplete: true в†’ go to Home Screen

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
FLUTTER NAVIGATION RULE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
if (res.data.user.isProfileComplete == false) в†’ Profile Setup Screen
if (res.data.user.isProfileComplete == true)  в†’ Home Screen

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EXPECTED RESPONSE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "isNewUser": true,
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbG...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbG...",
    "expiresIn": 604800,
    "user": {
      "id": 1,
      "email": "nirav@gmail.com",
      "displayName": "John Doe",
      "photoUrl": "https://...",
      "gender": "male",
      "countryName": "India",
      "countryCode": "IN",
      "isVip": false,
      "isOnline": true,
      "isProfileComplete": false,
      "walletBalance": 0,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```
Checks if an account already exists in the database by email or Google ID. Returns { exists: true/false, isProfileComplete: true/false }.

item.name: 2. Profile Update
item.description: Allows user to fetch and update their profile. Use GET first to load current data, then PATCH to send only the fields that changed.

request.description:
Returns the full profile of the currently logged-in user.

Note: DB columns are snake_case (e.g. display_name, photo_url) but the JSON API response uses camelCase (TypeScript property names).

Expected success response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "displayName": "Nirav V",
    "bio": "Software Developer | Video chat enthusiast",
    "photoUrl": "https://...",
    "countryId": 5,
    "countryName": "India",
    "countryCode": "IN",
    "gender": "male",
    "isVip": false,
    "isOnline": true,
    "isProfileComplete": true,
    "coins": 0,
    "urls": [
      "https://...",
      "https://..."
    ],
    "wallet": { "balance": 0, "currency": "coins" },
    "createdAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```
Updates user profile fields. All fields are optional вЂ” only send what needs to change.

item.name: 3. Video Calling
item.description:
Video calling uses 1 HTTP route + 2 WebSocket namespaces.

HTTP: GET /users/:id вЂ” loads partner info on call screen overlay.

WebSocket /matchmaking вЂ” handles finding, ringing, accepting, and skipping matches.

WebSocket /call вЂ” exchanges WebRTC Offer/Answer signaling directly between two devices.

New Upgrades:
- Anti-Failure Audio: microphones launch on all devices including mobile.
- Accurate Call Durations: calculated in single Node.js context, no negative time logs.
- Double-Spending Safe Coins: balance locked during purchase/spend, logs in purchased_coins and used_coins.

request.description:
HTTP Route: GET /users/:id

Loads partner name, photo, country, gender on the video call screen overlay when a match is found.

Set the `partnerId` collection variable before running this request.

item.name: вљЎ WS /matchmaking вЂ” How To Connect

request.description:
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ WEBSOCKET вЂ” NOT A REST API в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

This is a WebSocket namespace, not HTTP.
Do NOT click Send here. Follow the steps below.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
HOW TO TEST IN POSTMAN:
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. Click New в†’ WebSocket Request
2. Enter URL: ws://localhost:3000/matchmaking
3. Under Headers add:
   Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
4. Click Connect

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS TO SEND: FLUTTER в†’ BACKEND
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в–є match:joinQueue
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "gender": "male",
  "country": "IN",
  "isVip": false
}
в†’ Adds user to Redis matchmaking queue
в†’ Matching engine starts searching

в–є match:leaveQueue
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}"
}
в†’ Removes user from queue

в–є match:nextMatch  в†ђ SWIPE RIGHT TO LEFT
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "userId": "{{userId}}"
}
в†’ Closes current room
в†’ Other user gets call:partnerLeft event
в†’ THIS user re-joins queue automatically
в†’ New match:found sent when new partner found

в–є match:ping  (send every 30 seconds)
{
  "userId": "{{userId}}"
}
в†’ Keeps user alive in Redis queue

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS RECEIVED: BACKEND в†’ FLUTTER
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в—„ match:waiting
{
  "message": "Looking for match...",
  "queueSize": 5
}

в—„ match:found
{
  "roomId": "uuid-room-id",
  "partner": {
    "userId": "uuid",
    "displayName": "Jane",
    "photoUrl": "http://...",
    "country": "IN",
    "gender": "female",
    "isVip": false,
    "age": 23
  }
}

в—„ match:error
{
  "message": "Queue error, please retry"
}

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ WEBSOCKET вЂ” NOT A REST API в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

This is a WebSocket namespace, not HTTP.
Backend DOES NOT process video.
Video flows peer-to-peer between devices.
Backend only relays SDP and ICE signals.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
HOW TO TEST IN POSTMAN:
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. Click New в†’ WebSocket Request
2. Enter URL: ws://localhost:3000/call
3. Under Headers add:
   Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
4. Click Connect

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS TO SEND: FLUTTER в†’ BACKEND
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в–є call:sdpOffer  (User A sends after match:found)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "sdp": {
    "type": "offer",
    "sdp": "v=0\r\no=- ..."
  }
}
в†’ Backend relays to User B only

в–є call:sdpAnswer  (User B sends after receiving offer)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "sdp": {
    "type": "answer",
    "sdp": "v=0\r\no=- ..."
  }
}
в†’ Backend relays to User A only

в–є call:iceCandidate  (both users send multiple times)
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "candidate": {
    "candidate": "candidate:123...",
    "sdpMid": "0",
    "sdpMLineIndex": 0
  }
}
в†’ Backend relays to other user in room

в–є call:end  в†ђ CUT CALL BUTTON PRESSED
{
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}"
}
в†’ Room deleted from Redis
в†’ BOTH users receive call:ended event
в†’ BOTH users navigate to HOME screen
в†’ Call duration saved to MySQL
в†’ Nobody auto re-queues

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
EVENTS RECEIVED: BACKEND в†’ FLUTTER
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

в—„ call:sdpOffer      в†ђ relayed from partner
в—„ call:sdpAnswer     в†ђ relayed from partner
в—„ call:iceCandidate  в†ђ relayed from partner

в—„ call:partnerLeft   в†ђ partner swiped away
{
  "message": "Partner left",
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}"
}

в—„ call:ended         в†ђ someone pressed cut call
{
  "message": "Call ended",
  "roomId": "{{roomId}}",
  "duration": 125
}
в†’ Navigate BOTH users to home screen

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
FULL CALL FLOW SEQUENCE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1.  Both users в†’ match:joinQueue
2.  Both receive в†ђ match:found (same roomId)
3.  User A в†’ call:sdpOffer
4.  User B в†ђ call:sdpOffer (relayed)
5.  User B в†’ call:sdpAnswer
6.  User A в†ђ call:sdpAnswer (relayed)
7.  Both в†’ call:iceCandidate (multiple times)
8.  Both в†ђ call:iceCandidate (relayed)
9.  WebRTC peer connected вЂ” Video starts
10a. Swipe: User A в†’ match:nextMatch
     User B в†ђ call:partnerLeft
     User A finds new match automatically
10b. Cut Call: User A в†’ call:end
     Both в†ђ call:ended в†’ navigate to home screen
